2023-24 Vanderbilt Commodores Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 9-23 (4-14, 13th in SEC MBB)

Coach: Jerry Stackhouse

PS/G: 67.9 (313th of 362)

PA/G: 75.9 (292nd of 362)

SRS: 0.19 (151st of 362)

SOS: 8.16 (53rd of 362)

ORtg: 99.7 (312th of 362)

DRtg: 111.4 (342nd of 362)

Preseason Odds: Championship +25000
